content.problemStatement:
Sonya lives in a magical land which consists of NNN cities (numbered 111 through NNN) and N‚àí1N - 1N‚àí1 roads connecting them. In other words, the country where Sonya lives is a tree.

The country is magical because toys of an infinite number of types are made there. The types of toys are labeled by all integers and in each city, there is a toy store which sells an infinite number of toys of each type.

Some stores make better toys of some types than other stores. For each valid iii and each integer jjj, the quality of any toy with type jjj in the store in city iii is Ki‚ãÖj+BiK_i \cdot j + B_iKi‚Äã‚ãÖj+Bi‚Äã, where KiK_iKi‚Äã and BiB_iBi‚Äã are parameters of this store.

Sonya loves to buy toys from the magical land as gifts for her friends. She knows what types of toys her friends like. Therefore, she sometimes decides that she wants to buy a toy with some type zzz, travels along the shortest path between some cities uuu and vvv and buys one toy with the chosen type zzz. Obviously, she wants this toy to have the maximum possible quality among all toys with this type found in stores on this path (including stores in cities uuu and vvv), so she needs to know this maximum quality.

Also, sometimes, there are new reforms in the magical land, which change the parameters of some stores. In each reform, the shortest path between two cities uuu and vvv is chosen, along with two parameters xxx and yyy. Then, for each city ccc on this path (including uuu and vvv), KcK_cKc‚Äã is increased by xxx and BcB_cBc‚Äã is increased by yyy.

Your task is to process QQQ queries of two types:


uuu, vvv, xxx, yyy: There is a new reform.
uuu, vvv, zzz: Sonya wants to know the maximum of qualities of toys with type zzz sold on the simple path between cities uuu and vvv.
constraints: the graph described on the input is a tree
**Subtask #2 (36 points):** each city is directly connected to at most two other cities
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains two space-separated integers NNN and QQQ.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers ‚Äî the initial values of K1,K2,‚Ä¶,KNK_1, K_2, \ldots, K_NK1‚Äã,K2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,KN‚Äã.
The third line contains NNN space-separated integers ‚Äî the initial values of B1,B2,‚Ä¶,BNB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_NB1‚Äã,B2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,BN‚Äã.
Each of the following N‚àí1N-1N‚àí1 lines contains two space-separated integers uuu and vvv denoting that cities uuu and vvv are connected by a road.
The next QQQ lines describe queries.

Each of these lines starts with three space-separated integers ttt, uuu and vvv, where ttt denotes the type of the current query.
If t=1t = 1t=1, this is followed by a space and two space-separated integers xxx and yyy.
If t=2t = 2t=2, this is followed by a space and one integer zzz.
content.outputFormat: For each query of the second type, print a single line containing one integer ‚Äî the maximum possible quality of a toy Sonya can buy.
